parsed.production_notes: The video primarily uses live-action human recording, but integrates screencasts of an app featuring a 3D animated AI avatar, making it a mixed production.

characters.appearance: Young female, slim build, fair complexion, long straight dark hair. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Initially a fuzzy white sweater and black skirt, then a blue short-sleeve button-down top for the majority of the video, ending in a white sweater.

characters.appearance: Young male, slim build, fair complexion, short dark hair. Wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Initially a full pilot uniform with a white shirt, black tie, and hat. Later wears a simple dark grey t-shirt and a silver chain necklace.

characters.appearance: 3D animated male avatar, young, fair complexion, dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: White pilot shirt with epaulets, black tie.

scenes.setting: Plain white wall background, bright lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman and a young man stand side-by-side against a plain white wall. Character B is dressed in a full pilot's uniform, including a hat, tie, and lanyard. Character A wears a fuzzy white long-sleeve sweater and a black skirt. Character A playfully grabs Character B's arm and leans in towards him, looking up at his face with an exaggerated, pleading expression. Character B looks down at her and smiles.

scenes.visual_description: The scene opens with a playful interaction between a woman and a man in a pilot uniform against a plain background. Large text overlays dominate the center of the screen.
scenes.on_screen_text: 싱가포르 백수의 남편 비행 데려가달라고 조르기 (Singaporean unemployed wife begging to be taken on husband's flight)

scenes.setting: Living room with a white sofa, yellow patterned pillow, and a floor lamp. Later, a kitchen area with a white counter and black refrigerator.
scenes.camera: Talking-head close-up, then a medium shot

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on a white sofa, holding a beige crescent-shaped cushion. She wears a blue short-sleeve button-down top. She looks directly at the camera, speaking with a determined expression. The background includes a yellow patterned pillow and a modern floor lamp. The scene cuts briefly to Character B sitting at a white counter, looking thoughtfully at a silver laptop. He wears glasses and a dark grey t-shirt. The camera then cuts back to Character A on the sofa, who taps her head thoughtfully.

scenes.visual_description: Character A explains her situation to the camera from her living room couch. A brief cutaway shows Character B working on his laptop in the kitchen. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen translating her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 여러분 제 남편 암스테르담 비행있어요 [Everyone, my husband has a flight to Amsterdam.]
Character A says: 저번주에 호주 비행 따라갔지만 [I followed him on his Australia flight last week, but]
Character A says: 암스테르담도 따라가고 싶어요 [I want to follow him to Amsterdam too.]
Character A says: 타겟 저기 있어요 [The target is over there.]
Character A says: 전혀 쉽지 않아보여요 [It doesn't look easy at all.]
Character A says: 그래도 나 물러서지 않을거에요.. [But I won't back down..]
Character A says: 암스테르담 한번도 안가봤단말이에요 [I've never been to Amsterdam before.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
여러분 제 남편 암스테르담 비행있어요 (Everyone, my husband has a flight to Amsterdam)
저번주에 호주 비행 따라갔지만 (I followed him on his Australia flight last week, but)
암스테르담도 따라가고 싶어요 (I want to follow him to Amsterdam too)
타겟 저기 있어요 (The target is over there)
전혀 쉽지 않아보여요 (It doesn't look easy at all)
그래도 나 물러서지 않을거에요.. (But I won't back down..)
암스테르담 한번도 안가봤단말이에요 (I've never been to Amsterdam before)

scenes.setting: Living room, white sofa, yellow pillow.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on a white sofa, wearing a blue short-sleeve top. She holds a pink smartphone in her hands, looking down at the screen with a focused and sometimes frustrated expression. She speaks into the phone. The background features a white wall, a yellow patterned pillow, and a floor lamp.

Character C, a 3D animated male character dressed in a pilot uniform, stands in a cozy, warmly lit room with a lamp, armchair, and window showing a sunset. The character gestures slightly as if conversing.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is shown using a language learning app on her phone. The screen frequently shows screencasts of the app interface, featuring an animated AI pilot avatar. Text overlays and app UI elements are prominent throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 얼른 스픽앱 켜줘요 [Quickly turn on the Speak app.]
Character A says: 남편에게 비행 데려가달라고 부탁하는 상황으로 롤플레이 만들어요 [Create a roleplay for a situation where I ask my husband to take me on his flight.]
Character C says: You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along on the flight? [You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along on the flight?]
Character A says: AI주제에 진짜같고 강경하네요?! [For an AI, it's so realistic and stubborn?!]
Character A says: 나 지지않을거에요 열심히 스파르타로 싸워줘요 [I won't lose. Fight me hard like a Spartan.]
Character A says: 타겟이 관심가져요 [The target is showing interest.]
Character A says: 신경안쓰고 계속 프리톡해요 [I'll ignore him and keep free-talking.]
Character A says: 와우! 틀리니까 바로바로 고쳐줘요 [Wow! It corrects me immediately when I'm wrong.]
Character A says: 저를 강하게 키워줘요 [It raises me strong.]
Character A says: 제가 암스테르담가서 감자튀김 먹고싶다니까 [I said I want to go to Amsterdam and eat french fries]
Character C says: Definitely! "Vleminckx" is one of the most beloved fries stands in Amsterdam, known for its [Definitely! "Vleminckx" is one of the most beloved fries stands in Amsterdam, known for its]
Character A says: 제 AI남편이 감튀맛집 추천해줬어요 기술력 뭐에요? [My AI husband recommended a good french fry place. What is this technology?]
Character A says: 냅다 구글맵 켜서 저장해요 [I immediately open Google Maps and save it.]
Character A says: 내친김에 여행지 추천해달라해요 [While I'm at it, I ask for travel destination recommendations.]
Character C says: Of course! Amsterdam offers charming canals, the Van Gogh Museum, and the Anne Frank House, which many find deeply moving. Are you more interested in art, history, or simply enjo [Of course! Amsterdam offers charming canals, the Van Gogh Museum, and the Anne Frank House, which many find deeply moving. Are you more interested in art, history, or simply enjo]
Character A says: 와 여행계획까지..? 역시 세계최고기술 보유한 스픽.. [Wow, even travel plans..? As expected from Speak, which has the world's best technology..]
scenes.on_screen_text:
얼른 스픽앱 켜줘요 (Quickly turn on the Speak app)
남편에게 비행 데려가달라고 부탁하는 상황으로 롤플레이 만들어요 (Create a roleplay for a situation where I ask my husband to take me on his flight)
AI주제에 진짜같고 강경하네요?! (For an AI, it's so realistic and stubborn?!)
나 지지않을거에요 열심히 스파르타로 싸워줘요 (I won't lose. Fight me hard like a Spartan)
타겟이 관심가져요 (The target is showing interest)
신경안쓰고 계속 프리톡해요 (I'll ignore him and keep free-talking)
와우! 틀리니까 바로바로 고쳐줘요 (Wow! It corrects me immediately when I'm wrong)
저를 강하게 키워줘요 (It raises me strong)
제가 암스테르담가서 감자튀김 먹고싶다니까 (I said I want to go to Amsterdam and eat french fries)
제 AI남편이 감튀맛집 추천해줬어요 기술력 뭐에요? (My AI husband recommended a good french fry place. What is this technology?)
냅다 구글맵 켜서 저장해요 (I immediately open Google Maps and save it)
내친김에 여행지 추천해달라해요 (While I'm at it, I ask for travel destination recommendations)
와 여행계획까지..? 역시 세계최고기술 보유한 스픽.. (Wow, even travel plans..? As expected from Speak, which has the world's best technology..)

scenes.setting: Kitchen area with white cabinets and a black refrigerator.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A walks towards the camera with a determined look, then stands in a kitchen area. Character B stands behind her to her left. Character A speaks directly to the camera, then turns slightly to address Character B. Character B looks at her, listens, and responds with a calm, agreeable expression. Character A then turns back to the camera, looking surprised and laughing.

scenes.visual_description: Character A approaches Character B in the kitchen to ask her question in English. They have a brief conversation, and she reacts with surprise at his easy agreement. Subtitles translate their English conversation into Korean.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 저 준비됐어요 타겟 어프로치! [I'm ready. Target approach!]
Character A says: I want to ask you something. [I want to ask you something.]
Character B says: Mm. [Mm.]
Character A says: Can I follow your flight? [Can I follow your flight?]
Character B says: Oh, why do you want to come on my flight? [Oh, why do you want to come on my flight?]
Character A says: Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you. [Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you.]
Character B says: Okay. [Okay.]
Character A says: 뭐야 쉽자나요! [What, it's so easy!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
저 준비됐어요 타겟 어프로치! (I'm ready. Target approach!)
나 물어볼거있어 (I have something to ask you)
나 비행따라가도돼?? (Can I follow your flight??)
왜 내 비행 따라오고싶은데? (Why do you want to come on my flight?)
왜냐면 새해 첫 레이오버비행이구 (Because it's the first layover flight of the new year)
함께 의미 있는 시간을 보내고 싶어 (I want to spend meaningful time together)
뭐야 쉽자나요! (What, it's so easy!)

scenes.setting: Indoors, then an airplane window view at night.
scenes.camera: Close-up, then point-of-view out a window

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A smiles brightly at the camera while holding up a green passport and a boarding pass. The scene then cuts to a view out of an airplane window at night, showing the glowing lights of a city below and the plane's white engine casing in the foreground.

scenes.visual_description: Character A happily shows off her passport, indicating success. The video ends with a shot from an airplane window at night, accompanied by promotional text for the app.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: 여러분 지금 스픽 기간한정 최저가할인 행사하니까 캡션 참고해주세요!! [Everyone, Speak is having a limited-time lowest price discount event right now, so please check the caption!!]
scenes.on_screen_text: 여러분 지금 스픽 기간한정 최저가할인 행사하니까 캡션 참고해주세요!! (Everyone, Speak is having a limited-time lowest price discount event right now, so please check the caption!!)
